response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Lyrics and dialogue match perfectly with the on-screen performance and audio.
2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the remaining talk segment and song lines with meticulous timing. Corrected '字が持ってる' to '縮まってる' based on correct audio understanding.
3. Timing & Pacing: Corrected the typo in index 11 (restored to 00:20.800) and correctly set index 52's start time to 01:58.900. Timed dialogue and musical segments closely to vocal cord activation and physical actions (like kicks) to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 僕にとっての女王様
subtitles.english: My very own queen...

subtitles.original: そんなあなたを今夜抱きしめる
subtitles.english: Tonight, I'll hold you close,

subtitles.original: and 熱い唇をいただく
subtitles.english: And receive your hot lips,

subtitles.original: そして何よりも欲しいのよ
subtitles.english: And more than anything, I want it,

subtitles.original: あなたの心 狂おしいほど
subtitles.english: Your heart, enough to drive me mad.

subtitles.original: It's a party night
subtitles.english: It's a party night,

subtitles.original: Dancin' with us
subtitles.english: Dancin' with us,

subtitles.original: Everybody don't stop dance
subtitles.english: Everybody, don't stop dancing,

subtitles.original: Let's go, just do it!
subtitles.english: Let's go, just do it!

subtitles.original: 茨の道だろうが
subtitles.english: Even if it's a thorny road,

subtitles.original: 凍てつく夜だろうが
subtitles.english: Even if it's a freezing night,

subtitles.original: 不可能が可能になるさ
subtitles.english: The impossible will become possible,

subtitles.original: 君と二人で Lupin the Fire!
subtitles.english: With just the two of us, Lupin the Fire!

subtitles.original: だからそう だから誰も手にした事ないお宝
subtitles.english: So, that's why, that's why, a treasure that nobody has ever laid hands on...

subtitles.original: もらう 狙った獲物は逃がさない
subtitles.english: ...I will take. I never let a targeted prey escape,

subtitles.original: それがなんだろうと大泥棒
subtitles.english: No matter what it is, I'm a master thief.

subtitles.original: 先の先まで計算たてて
subtitles.english: Calculating far ahead,

subtitles.original: 瞬時にひらめく名案
subtitles.english: An excellent idea instantly flashes,

subtitles.original: そして「あっ！」と思ったらもう居ない
subtitles.english: And when you think 'Ah!', I'm already gone.

subtitles.original: もはや芸術ばりの盗みの美学
subtitles.english: It's already a beauty of stealing, like art.

subtitles.original: Put your hands up in the air!
subtitles.english: Put your hands up in the air!

subtitles.original: Let me show you my everything
subtitles.english: Let me show you my everything,

subtitles.original: 夢のこのファンタジー見てな
subtitles.english: Behold this fantasy of a dream.

subtitles.original: 今こそ走る時なんだ It's show time!
subtitles.english: Now is the time to run, it's show time!

subtitles.original: そこで見ててよワンマンショー
subtitles.english: Watch me right there, my one-man show!

subtitles.original: これぐらいの試練じゃ足んないよ
subtitles.english: An ordeal of this level isn't enough,

subtitles.original: 僕が欲しいのは物じゃない I steal your heart
subtitles.english: What I want isn't an object, I steal your heart.

subtitles.original: 絶対に逃がさん！
subtitles.english: I absolutely won't let you escape!

subtitles.original: 無駄な抵抗はやめて大人しくお縄に就け！ルパン！
subtitles.english: Give up this futile resistance and surrender quietly! Lupin!

subtitles.original: 逃がさんぞー！
subtitles.english: I won't let you get away!

subtitles.original: 誰かが居ないと張り合いがない
subtitles.english: There's no competition if nobody is here,

subtitles.original: 相手が居てこそ間違いがない
subtitles.english: With an opponent, there's no mistake.

subtitles.original: 身近にゃ素敵なライバル
subtitles.english: A wonderful rival close by,

subtitles.original: 競い合い互いにハイになる
subtitles.english: Competing with each other, we both get high.

subtitles.original: ファイナルステージだ天王山
subtitles.english: It's the final stage, the showdown,

subtitles.original: お前と勝負 of 演奏さ
subtitles.english: A musical performance battle with you.

subtitles.original: マジで今夜はサシで どっちが勝っても文句はナシで
subtitles.english: Seriously tonight, just the two of us, whoever wins, no complaints!

subtitles.original: Put your hands up in the air!
subtitles.english: Put your hands up in the air!

subtitles.original: ワルサー使いこなす僕はワルさ
subtitles.english: Mastering the Walther, I'm bad,

subtitles.original: 曲がったこと嫌いプラスアルファ
subtitles.english: Hating twisted things, plus alpha.

subtitles.original: ラップマスター ジェダイも目じゃない
subtitles.english: Rap master, even Jedi can't match,

subtitles.original: しかし可愛い女にも目がない
subtitles.english: But I also have a soft spot for cute girls.

subtitles.original: Oh baby それは演技？ or 本気？
subtitles.english: Oh baby, is that acting? Or for real?

subtitles.original: 僕は君に一本気
subtitles.english: I'm single-minded for you.

subtitles.original: 一本道走り続けます
subtitles.english: I'll keep running down this single-track path,

subtitles.original: 空へ飛ばす 今日から明日
subtitles.english: Flying into the sky, from today to tomorrow.

subtitles.english: Behold this fantasy of a dream.

subtitles.english: Now is the time to run, it's show time!

subtitles.original: そこで見ててよワンマンショー
subtitles.english: Watch me right there, my one-man show!

subtitles.original: これぐらいの試練じゃ足んないよ
subtitles.english: An ordeal of this level isn't enough,

subtitles.original: 僕が欲しいのは物じゃない
subtitles.english: What I want isn't an object,

subtitles.original: あなたのハート
subtitles.english: But your heart.

subtitles.original: 愛すべき仲間や家族がいる
subtitles.english: I have precious friends and family,

subtitles.original: 信念やプライドを曲げずに貫くべし！
subtitles.english: I must stick to my beliefs and pride without bending!

subtitles.original: Lupin the fire...
subtitles.english: Lupin the fire...

subtitles.original: Let me show you my everything
subtitles.english: Let me show you my everything,

subtitles.original: 眩しい眼差しをうけて
subtitles.english: Basking in your dazzling gaze,

subtitles.original: 君のために今日を捨てるよ
subtitles.english: For you, I will throw away today,

subtitles.original: It's show time!
subtitles.english: It's show time!

subtitles.original: 世界で一人の最愛の君自身に 気持ちを伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: To the one and only, most beloved you, I want to convey my feelings.

subtitles.original: 僕が欲しいのは物じゃない あなたのハート
subtitles.english: What I want isn't an object, but your heart.

subtitles.original: 普段はとぼけた三枚目
subtitles.english: Usually a silly clown,

subtitles.original: やるときゃ誰より真剣で
subtitles.english: But when I act, I'm more serious than anyone.

subtitles.original: 頼りになるいざという時
subtitles.english: Reliable when it really counts,

subtitles.original: こうなりたい 誰が見ても素敵
subtitles.english: I want to be like this, looking wonderful to anyone.

subtitles.original: 知性備えたスーパーマン
subtitles.english: An intellectual superman,

subtitles.original: 横にはお決まりスーパーウーマン
subtitles.english: With the usual superwoman by my side.

subtitles.original: 残り二小節ラストスパート
subtitles.english: Two bars left, the last spurt,

subtitles.original: 憧れの男 Lupin the Third
subtitles.english: The man of my dreams, Lupin the Third!

subtitles.original: 獲物は確かにいただいたぜ
subtitles.english: I have indeed taken the prize.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、グレイトフルデイズとルパン・ザ・ファイヤーを2曲続けて聴いていただきました！
subtitles.english: Yes! And with that, you just heard two songs in a row: Grateful Days and Lupin the Fire!

subtitles.original: グレイトフルデイズはですね、えーっと、男性二人と女性一人の曲なんですけど、
subtitles.english: So, Grateful Days is originally a song for two males and one female,

subtitles.original: 女性のところはね、絶対アズちゃんが良いってことでアズちゃん、
subtitles.english: and I absolutely wanted Azu-chan for the female part, so Azu-chan is there.

subtitles.original: で、ラップパートはもう、ノエルちゃんの顔しか浮かばなかったのでノエルちゃんにお願いしました！
subtitles.english: As for the rap part, only Noel-chan's face came to mind, so I asked Noel-chan to do it!

subtitles.original: 二人ともありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, you two!

subtitles.original: でね、ルパンの映像が流れてみんなびっくりしたんじゃない？ころねもびっくりした！
subtitles.english: And during Lupin, those visuals popped up, so wasn't everyone surprised? I was surprised too!

subtitles.original: で、今日のハッシュタグは、もうね、7周年だって、すごいよね。
subtitles.english: So, today's hashtag, it's already our 7th anniversary, which is amazing.

subtitles.original: この上のハッシュタグ「#戌神ころね7周年」で、ぜひいっぱい呟いてください。スクショも大丈夫だよ！
subtitles.english: Please tweet a lot with the hashtag above: #InugamiKorone7thAnniversary. Screenshots are fine too!

subtitles.original: ね、ここのステージ。なんか今日は違った感じだけど、ここはどこなんでしょうか？
subtitles.english: You see, this stage. It feels a bit different today, but where are we?

subtitles.original: どこ？
subtitles.english: Where?

subtitles.original: イヌバレー！
subtitles.english: Inu Valley!

subtitles.original: 素敵。今日はイヌバレーから、えー、すべてお送りしますので、よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: Wonderful. Today, we'll be bringing everything to you from Inu Valley, so please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: って思ったんだけどさ、なんか、画面小さくない？って思ってるよね、リスナーさん。
subtitles.english: But thinking about it, isn't the screen a bit small? That's what you listeners are thinking, right?

subtitles.original: ころねもちょっと思ったので、ちょっとね、
subtitles.english: I thought so too, so...

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って！
subtitles.english: Ah, wait a second!

subtitles.original: なんか、縮まってる！縮まってる！
subtitles.english: It's shrinking! It's shrinking!

subtitles.original: やめて！やばい、やばい！
subtitles.english: Stop! Oh no, oh no!

subtitles.original: つぶれちゃうよ、これ！
subtitles.english: I'm going to get crushed!

subtitles.original: ちょっと押して、今は令和なのでね、画面を広く使いたいので、
subtitles.english: Let me push it back. Since this is the Reiwa era, I want to use a wider screen, so...

subtitles.original: あっち行け！
subtitles.english: go away!

subtitles.original: もうちょっとあっち行け！
subtitles.english: Go away a bit more!

subtitles.original: もうちょっと！
subtitles.english: A bit more!

subtitles.original: おけおけおけ。こっちは？
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay. How about this side?

subtitles.original: あっち行け！
subtitles.english: Go away!

subtitles.original: え、そんなころねと居たいの？おいで。
subtitles.english: What, do you want to be with me that much? Come here.

subtitles.original: ホントに来るんじゃねぇよ！
subtitles.english: Don't actually come!

subtitles.original: ホントに来るんじゃねぇよ！
subtitles.english: Don't actually come over here!
